# designjobs.cv — Extended LLM Context

For the complete machine-readable job listing (all current roles in structured format), see:
https://designjobs.cv/llms-jobs.txt

For structured JSON data on all jobs:
https://designjobs.cv/jobs.json

---

## About designjobs.cv

designjobs.cv is a community-sourced board for UX/product design roles at startups.
Coverage spans healthcare, AI, fintech, climate, consumer, enterprise/SaaS, trades
technology, gov/civic, and education verticals. Both full-time and contract/freelance
roles are listed. Every listing is browser-verified against the company's official
ATS (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, Gem, etc.) before publication.

## Technical Details

- Built with Astro + Tailwind CSS, hosted on Vercel
- Job data as JSON at /jobs.json (public API, CORS open)
- Individual job pages at /jobs/{id} with full Schema.org JobPosting markup
- Sitemap at /sitemap.xml includes all job pages
- RSS feed at /rss.xml with pub dates
- Source: https://github.com/cmonies/healthcare-jobs

## Data Schema (per job)

id, title, company, companyUrl, url (ATS link), level, locationType,
location, postedAt, vertical, employmentType, tags[], salary (when available)
